subject: Paldean Tauros, a dark-coated bull Pokemon with distinctive curved horns, shown in an aggressive charging pose
description: A muscular, dark-bodied bull creature stands in a forward-leaning aggressive stance, head lowered as if preparing to charge. Its coat is very dark, nearly black, with vivid magenta or reddish-pink accents visible on the tips of its horns and markings on its face and mane. Three tails are visible fanning out behind it. The background is a dramatic swirl of warm reddish-orange and smoky tones suggesting heat or volcanic energy. The overall silhouette is imposing and broad-shouldered.
foreground: Dark muscular bull with curved horns and multiple tails in charging stance
emotion: aggressive, ready to charge, head lowered and tense
